name: atlas
description: Deploy-anywhere text-to-SQL agent with auto-generated semantic layer and production-grade security

scripts.dev: bash scripts/db-up.sh && bun run --hot packages/api/src/api/server.ts & API_PID=$!; trap 'kill $API_PID 2>/dev/null' EXIT; bun run --filter '@atlas/web' dev
scripts.type: bun run --filter '@useatlas/types' build && bun run --filter '@useatlas/plugin-sdk' build && bun run --filter '@useatlas/sdk' build && bun run --filter '@useatlas/react' build && tsgo --noEmit && bun run --filter '@atlas/web' type
scripts.db:multi-env:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.multi-env.yml up -d pg-dev pg-staging pg-prod
scripts.db:multi-env:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.multi-env.yml down -v && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.multi-env.yml up -d pg-dev pg-staging pg-prod
scripts.test: bun run test:api && bun run test:others
scripts.test:others: bun run --filter '@atlas/cli' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/mcp' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/oauth-helper' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/web' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/ee' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/schemas' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/sdk' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/plugin-sdk' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/webhook-publisher' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/jira' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/twenty' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/yaml-context' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/mcp' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/bigquery' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/clickhouse' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/mysql' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/duckdb' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/snowflake' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/salesforce' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/email' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/nsjail' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/sidecar' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/vercel-sandbox' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/daytona' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/e2b' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/react' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/teams' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/webhook' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/webhook-action' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/obsidian-reader' test
scripts.test:browser:prod: bun x playwright test --config e2e/browser/playwright.config.ts --project production
scripts.deps:update: bun update && bun x syncpack fix
